title: sida vallsii
intro: Sida vallsii, also known as the hairy sida, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are derived from its roots and leaves. The health benefits of Sida vallsii include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. Herbal preparations of Sida vallsii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support the immune system and alleviate symptoms of certain conditions.
